ksa_text: Knowledge of data pipeline monitoring and observability, including data freshness tracking, volume anomaly detection, schema change detection, job failure pattern analysis, and alerting system design.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("pipelines?", "schemas?", "data monitor"). STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.3917); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation strong: 4 job-posting-level and 0 certification-level matches (AWS DE, Databricks, dbt, GCP DE). Competency appears regularly in DE role descriptions and/or certification curricula.
